doc_title: Influence of Neighborhood on the Preference of an Item in eCommerce Search

items.fact: Lichtenstein et. al presented some early work on how people make decisions under uncertainty
items.evidence_span: Lichtenstein et. al presented some early work on how people make decisions under uncertainty in [15]

items.fact: Importance of a context (neighborhood) for a given item to its clickability has been extensively researched
items.evidence_span: Importance of a context (neighborhood) for a given item to its clickability has been extensively researched in the past.

items.fact: Previous studies of users' clicks as implicit feedback in search found out that clicking decision on a web document is affected by both rank and other documents in the presentation
items.evidence_span: Previous studies of users' clicks as implicit feedback in search found out that clicking decision on a web document is affected by both rank and other documents in the presentation [16], [17].

items.fact: Craswell et al. introduced the cascade click model where the probability of click for a given document at a given rank is influenced by probability of click for documents at higher ranks
items.evidence_span: Craswell et al. [18] introduced the cascade click model where the probability of click for a given document at a given rank is influenced by probability of click for documents at higher ranks.

items.fact: Dupret et al. introduced a new browsing behavior model, where the probability of a subsequent click for a given document is affected by a distance between that document and the most recently clicked document
items.evidence_span: Dupret et al. [19] introduced a new browsing behavior model, where the probability of a subsequent click for a given document is affected by a distance between that document and the most recently clicked document.
